additional_patterns.name: plot_twists
evidence: "the resolution basically stomped all over my emotional build up"

summary: The user enjoys psychological thrillers and horror films, particularly those with slow pacing and atmospheric qualities. They appreciate emotional depth in storytelling but have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and plot resolutions.
